headline: Launch-facing feedback and release handoff are sharper in this build.
notes: Rebuilds the feedback desk into a cleaner beta handoff surface with issue-type presets for broken links, tone issues, layout friction, save/share bugs, and route-output problems.
Upgrades What's New into a faster tester-facing release hub with quick paths, current-build visibility, and recommended checks pulled from the live version metadata.
Polishes feedback and beta-launch wording so launch-facing surfaces feel less like internal QA notes and more like a real public beta product layer.
